name: UGC Testimonial
description: User-generated content style. Authentic feel with customer reactions, unboxing, and personal endorsement. Works best with real customer footage or UGC-style clips.

scenes.description: Customer reaction or bold claim that stops the scroll
scenes.footage_hint: Person speaking to camera or reacting to product

scenes.description: Opening the package, first look at the product
scenes.footage_hint: Hands opening box, revealing product, first touch

scenes.description: Using the product in real life -- show the experience
scenes.footage_hint: Product in use, lifestyle context, natural setting

scenes.description: Genuine reaction to the product quality or results

scenes.footage_hint: Person endorsing product, review screenshot, star rating overlay
Product beauty shot or person with product
